title: Preparation of electrocompetent cells
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"fvh5g","text":"Preparation of electrocompetent cells 
Weinstock paper:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":37},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4hieg","text":"Matthew T Weinstock, Eric D Hesek,Christopher M Wilson, Daniel G Gibson","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":19},{"key":1,"offset":21,"length":12},{"key":2,"offset":34,"length":20},{"key":3,"offset":56,"length":15}],"data":[]},{"key":"7pl6t","text":"Vibrio natriegens as a fast-growing host for molecular biology
Nature Methods volume 13, pages 849–851 (2016)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3e2al","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1q7cf","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6v5l5","text":"To prepare the day before:

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"59t72","text":"-LB I media  +V2 salts (204 mM NaCl, 4.2 mM KCl, 23.14mM MgCl2 )","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2fbr4","text":"-electroporation buffer (680 mM sucrose, 7 mM K2HPO4, pH 7) ( sterile filtrated)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":54,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2c36g","text":"-over night culture of  V.n from the cryo-stock in LBI + v2 salts (37 °C ; at 200 r.p.m)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2j5ru","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"30hf","text":"Preparing culture :","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eu5t4","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cucdq","text":"Depending on how many aliquds you want to have, incubate media with your overnight culture for a starting OD of 0.05.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dtj10","text":"The culture is grown at 37 °C in a baffled flask, shaking at 200 r.p.m. until an OD600 between 0.5 to 0.8 is reached.
*be careful when they reach an OD near 0.1, V. natriegensis very fast growing,  so start measuring in shorter time periods.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":162,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"q79l","text":"Prechill the electroporation buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1ta41","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f4596","text":"Washing:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b1h29","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"am1ic","text":"From here on try always to keep your culture on ice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6nmhq","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6167r","text":"-The culture is then put on ice for 15 min. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d4f3f","text":" ( the original Protocol sais to directly fill them into your prechilled centrifugatin  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e7gfp","text":"  containments )","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c7vc8","text":"-The cells are pelleted at 3000x g. for 20 min at 4 °C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ddvd0","text":"-The supernatant is carefully decanted and the cell pellets are gently suspended in 10mL
 of chilled electroporation buffer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":93,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"84s2s","text":"-The suspensions are transferred to a chilled50mL falcon tube and the tube is filled top
 with additional chilled electroporation buffer (50mL) and inverted several times. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":38,"length":7},{"style":"bold","offset":106,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"837bl","text":"-The cells are centrifuged down at 3000x g  for 15 min at 4 °C. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1nefn","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c1e39","text":"-The wash is repeated two times for a total of three washes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7daod","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5fb0n","text":"Aliquotation:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3tbsf","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qrdr","text":"After the final wash, the supernant is carefully decanted the cells are gently resuspended in residual electroporation buffer. 
Measure the OD in a  1/20 dilution against electroporation buffer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fmv2t","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ma9m","text":"The volume is adjusted with additional electroporation buffer to bring the final OD600 to 16.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8tiip","text":"  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"apuu0","text":"The Cells are aliquoted ( 80µL ) into chilled 1.5µL centrifugation tubes, directly frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at −80 °C until use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D828ECFDC48746BAA215E5EC1283DBD7","url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nmeth.3970#auth-1"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"47932D38350E4734BBD1FCAC90CD4CAE","url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nmeth.3970#auth-2"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CE65E702B6734FD491987C0CDD0E1A1F","url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nmeth.3970#auth-3"}},"3":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B1DDD6DDC209439790DE6B724ED5F7D7","url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nmeth.3970#auth-4"}}}}
creator: Josef Hoff
